DPmixGPD 0.0.8
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • GitHub

DPmixGPD

DPmixGPD delivers Dirichlet process mixtures with optional generalized Pareto tails so you can model the bulk and extremes with shared mixture weights and clean prediction APIs.

Vignette tour

  • Onboarding: Start here explains what problems the package solves and presents the canonical simul + fit loop.
  • Installation & reproducibility: 01-installation shows how to install, seed Nimble, and debug initialization warnings.
  • Single-outcome modeling: v02-single-outcome-modeling tells the full story for bulk + tail fits.
  • Causal CQTE: v05-causal-cqte plus v06-causal-extras cover treatment-specific fits, CQTE plotting, and comparisons with ATE/CATE.
  • Backends: v03-backends-crp-vs-sb contrasts the CRP and stick-breaking engines.
  • Kernel guidance: v04-kernels-guide and the kernel-specific pages provide parameter meanings, priors, and domain guidance.
  • Prediction & exports: v08-prediction-and-exports plus the legacy Prediction vignette detail density, quantile, and survival forecasts.
  • Troubleshooting & survival: v09-troubleshooting and v07-survival cover warning fixes and survival-style tips.
  • Developer resources: v10-developer-guide walks through kernel registration, Nimble hooks, and the regression checklist.

Status checks

Metric Current value Source
Test coverage (tests) 0% inst/extdata/coverage_status.json (run tools/update_coverage_status.R)
Coverage helper DPmixGPD::coverage_status() runs covr::package_coverage() and can refresh the JSON file
Status reader DPmixGPD::read_coverage_status() easy lookup for badges or pkgdown site

Run tools/update_coverage_status.R after expanding the test suite to keep the status data and home-page summary up to date.
